reason: The answer correctly identifies all major stages and responsible packages: fsnotify/watch debounce, index walk with ignore filtering, chunk parsing via tree-sitter, SHA dedup, embedding via internal/embed, UpsertMany writing to chunks/chunk_vecs/chunks_fts, and Store.Search making it queryable — matching the ground truth pipeline accurately.
